title: zaleya pentandra
intro: Zaleya pentandra, a species of flowering plant in the family Achariaceae, is commonly known as the 'wild curry leaf'. It is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Zaleya pentandra include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and protect against respiratory infections. The plant is often prepared into various herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
